_comment: Verified 2026-06-30 from gemini.google.com DOM inspection. Input is Quill editor (ql-editor) with aria-label='Enter a prompt for Gemini'. Send button is button[aria-label='Send message'] — only visible while text is typed. Response container div.response-container only appears after a message is sent (not in zero-state). Clean answer text is in div.markdown.markdown-main-panel. No stop button found in DOM — rely on DOM stabilization.
